nasb.text: All who are under the yoke as slaves are to regard their own masters as worthy of all honor so that the name of God and our doctrine will not be spoken against.

esv.text: Let all who are under a yoke as bondservants regard their own masters as worthy of all honor, so that the name of God and the teaching may not be reviled.

cnv.text: 凡負軛作奴僕的，應當看自己的主人是配受十分的敬重，免得　神的名和道理被人褻瀆。

ccb.text: 做奴仆的要全心尊重自己的主人，免得上帝的名和我们的教导被人亵渎。

csbs.text: 凡是负轭做奴仆的，应该看自己的主人配受十分尊重，免得神的名和神的教导受到亵渎。
